---
name: "TH7 E2 — Verification Confidence and Downgrade Discipline"
about: "Implement TH7.E2 Verification Confidence and Downgrade Discipline"
labels: [epic, TH7, E2]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Tighten verification thresholds and token budgets: make verification kickoff stricter and smaller than implementation kickoff where needed.
- [ ] US2 — Add verification-specific contamination reason codes: distinguish sparse aligned evidence from off-profile contamination.
- [ ] US3 — Minimize workflow-verification kickoff when workflow artifacts dominate: downgrade broad workflow history instead of injecting it.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH7-verification-calibrated-audit-kickoff/epics/E2-verification-confidence-and-downgrade-discipline/stories/`
